meaning: adj.用口头的adv.做出声音,用口头n.口试
examples: Secondly, new TOEFL is an internet-based test, and IELTS combines paper-based test with vivavoce, while CET mainly applies paper-based testing method.
If the feedback from two or more than two specialists concerning the vivavoce is negative, the candidate fails in terms of viva application this time.
